title: Embed Your Agent on Your Website
lede: Turn a Smart Agent into a website widget or popup with text, voice, and optional avatar, then paste one snippet of code to go live.

steps.title: Prepare the Agent
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open (or create) the agent you want on your site.
  2. Write a prompt tailored to your product and, optionally, attach a Knowledge Base so it answers accurately.
  3. Pick the brain (LLM) and a voice if you want voice replies.

images.caption: Configure the agent first, then publish it as a website widget.
Configure the agent first, then publish it as a website widget.

steps.title: Enable the Website Widget
steps.content:
1. Open the Website Widget panel and turn on Enable Website Widget.
  2. Under Capabilities, choose how visitors interact: Text, Voice, and optionally an Avatar (avatar requires voice).

images.caption: The Website Widget panel: capabilities, avatar, theme, layout, and embed code.
The Website Widget panel: capabilities, avatar, theme, layout, and embed code.

steps.title: Style the Widget
steps.content:
• Avatar: choose a display mode (Avatar Only or Side by Side) and pick or upload an avatar image.
  • Theme & Header: set Light, Dark, Auto, or Custom colors and a header title.
  • Layout & Position: choose Widget (docked to a corner) or Popup, and set its screen position or size.
  • Behavior: decide whether it auto-opens and whether the agent starts talking when opened.

steps.title: Preview and Embed
steps.content:
1. Open the Embed Code & Preview section to see a live preview.
  2. Copy the generated <script> snippet.
  3. Paste it into your site's HTML where you want the agent to appear, then reload the page and test it.

cards.title: Add a Knowledge Base
cards.description: Help the widget answer product questions accurately.

cards.title: Add Tools
cards.description: Let the widget book meetings or call your APIs.

cards.title: Privacy & Recording
cards.description: Decide what conversation data is stored.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
